title: jatropha macrantha
intro: Jatropha macrantha, also known as the large-leaved jatropha or buffalo horn, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its latex and seeds. The health benefits of Jatropha macrantha include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of Jatropha macrantha include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
